PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?birthplace WHERE {
  ?event wdt:P31 wd:Q182557 ; rdfs:label "1966 European Indoor Championships" @en ; wdt:P585 ?eventDate .
  FILTER(YEAR(?eventDate) = 1966)
  ?event wdt:P1454 ?competition .
  ?competition rdfs:label "Long jump, men" @en .
  ?competition wdt:P175 ?athlete .
  ?athlete wdt:P27 wd:Q145 .
  ?athlete wdt:P19 ?birthplace .
}
